free_text: Nuclear Structure of 16N
No details are given.
BP
Fig.3, page 565.
Nitrogen gas target in a thin-
window gas cell.
The target was nitrogen gas enriched to 99.4%
in 15N, contained in a thin-window rotating gas cell.
The reaction protons were analysed in a 65 cm radius
broad-range magnetic spectrograph, and recorded in
Ilford K2 nuclear emulsions 50 microm thick.

Fig.5, page 568.
An adenin (C5H5N5) solid target on a thin carbon
backing.
The reaction protons were analysed in a multi-
angle, broad-range magnetic spectrograph and recorded
in Ilford K2 nuclear emulsion plates at 24 angles.
Plate scanning and data analysis were performed at
the University of Pennsylvania.
